title: WorkDoc Copy/Paste to Automation Text Adding Blank Lines
excerpt: I have a WorkDoc that is a checklist. I want to paste this list to Text in an automation. The paste adds 2 blank lines between each line of text. When I paste the same copy to a Word doc or Google Doc, no lines are added…

posts.author: crenosis (Cory Renosis)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a WorkDoc that is a checklist. I want to paste this list to Text in an automation. The paste adds 2 blank lines between each line of text. When I paste the same copy to a Word doc or Google Doc, no lines are added. When I copy the same text from a Word doc or Google Doc, to Text in an automation, it does not add the 2 lines. I want to not have to leave monday.com to grab data for my workflow.
